use_cases: Display a loading state while waiting for data to fetch
Show progress feedback during async operations or page transitions
Use as a placeholder while content is being processed
Indicate work in progress in dashboards or admin panels
Provide visual feedback during form submissions or API calls
ai_summary: A minimal counter-style loading animation component featuring 15 grid-positioned boxes that animate on and off in a pattern, creating a sequential counter-like visual effect. Built with styled-components and CSS keyframe animations for smooth looping transitions. Ideal for indicating loading states in various web applications where a simple, non-intrusive spinner is needed.
